results.title: RBI considering issuing plastic notes: Pilot project expected after final green light
results.description: Reports said that the matter of issuance of plastic notes was discussed in board meetings of the RBI. This initiative could get the final green light in upcoming RBI Board meetings, following which a pilot project is could be rolled out shortly thereafter.

results.title: Bank fraud cases halve, but value climbs to ₹48,000 crore: RBI data
results.description: RBI data showed frauds worth ₹48,021 crore in 2025-26, driven mainly by loan-related cases, while the number of reported frauds declined sharply across the banking sector

results.title: Three Years of Tinubu: Nigeria’s President highlights successes, challenges
results.description: "Had we refused to act, our nation would have drifted toward fiscal breakdown, worsening poverty, and severe economic uncertainty." The post Three Years of Tinubu: Nigeria’s President highlights successes, challenges appeared first on Premium Times Nigeria .

results.title: Estate vs non-estate: what the numbers actually say
results.description: Ask most buyers on the KZN North Coast whether they want to buy in an estate, and the answer is almost always yes. The appeal is intuitive – security, community, shared amenities, a managed environment. But intuition and data do not always align, and in a market where estate premiums are as pronounced as they [...]
